title: מישהו/י עוזב את עבודתו
body: Wishing you lots of success in your next chapter. Sounds like you’ve built something really meaningful along the way 🙌

title: חברה מגייסת תפקיד
body:
Sounds like an exciting opportunity and a great time to join the team.
Happy to help you find that perfect match if needed 😉

title: מישהו יצר משהו בעבודה
body: This is really impressive. Always inspiring to see people building and pushing things forward 🚀

title: הישג חדש לחברה
body: Huge congratulations to the entire team. Milestones like this are always the result of a lot of hard work behind the scenes 👏

title: מתחיל/ה עבודה חדשה
body:
Congratulations on the new role and the exciting journey ahead 🚀
Wishing you lots of success in this next chapter.
